q: What is the source of carbon for plants to make their own organic molecules?

a: More area for collection and less distance to diffuse out

q: Most plants have extensive branching bodies and extensive root systems to obtain which of the following?

a: Not tightly packed and have many spaces around them

q: Where does water travel in the apoplastic pathway?
a: Through cellulose cell walls, dead cells, and hollow tubes

a: To allow $CO_2$ to diffuse into the leaf

q: What happens to the plant when water loss by transpiration exceeds the rate of uptake?
a: Cells become less turgid and the plant wilts
